name: Fettucine with Butter & Cream - Fettuccine All'alfredo
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare noodles using Basic Egg Pasta Dough (made with 2-1/4 cups all-purpose flour).
2. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
3. When butter foams, add cream to the skillet and simmer until slightly thickened.
4. Season the sauce with salt and white pepper for about 2 minutes.
5. Fill a very large saucepan two-thirds full with salted water and bring it to a boil.
6. Add the prepared noodles to the boiling water and cook until they are tender but firm to the bite, which should take around 10-12 minutes.
7. Drain the cooked noodles in a colander.
8. Place the drained noodles in the skillet containing the sauce and add 1/4 cup of grated Parmesan cheese.
9. Toss the noodles gently over medium heat until the sauce coats them completely, for about 20 to 30 seconds.
10. Serve immediately with additional Parmesan cheese on top. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
